topic: Inverse relationship (stopping distance vs cone radius)
image_prompt: SVG scatter graph 'Stopping distance against cone radius'. X-axis R / m from 0 to 0.2 (ticks 0, 0.05, 0.10, 0.15, 0.20), no minor gridlines; Y-axis Stopping distance / m from 0 to 25 (ticks 0,5,10,15,20,25). Smooth inverse-decay best-fit curve (d = k/R, k = 2.1) through teal × markers descending from (0.10, 21) to (0.19, 11). Domain stops at the data — does not extend to the origin.

SVG scatter graph 'Stopping distance against inverse of cone radius squared'. X-axis R⁻² / m⁻² from 0 to 120 (ticks 0,20,40,60,80,100,120), no minor gridlines; Y-axis Stopping distance / m from 0 to 25 (ticks 0,5,10,15,20,25). Because the true relationship is d ∝ 1/R (not 1/R²), the plot against 1/R² is a concave-down rising curve (d = 2.1·√x), NOT a straight line through the origin. Teal × markers from (27.7, 11) to (100, 21); curve drawn only across the data domain 27.7 to 100.

topic: Mu Cephei red supergiant vs hot blue star
image_prompt: SVG: two side-by-side space panels. Left: a huge cool red supergiant labelled 'Mu Cephei — red supergiant (cool)' with surface flares. Right: a hot blue star with corona streaks labelled 'Hot blue star (e.g. 25,000 °C)'.

topic: Kepler space telescope detecting an exoplanet by transit
image_prompt: SVG: deep-space scene titled 'Kepler space telescope — transit detection of an exoplanet'. A stylised Kepler telescope (cylindrical body, sunshield, solar panel, antenna) on the left aims a dashed yellow sightline at a glowing Sun-like host star on the right. A dark exoplanet transits in front of the star; an inner planet at 0.05 AU (too hot, red) is also shown. Dashed elliptical orbital path and a dashed green habitable-zone band. Inset 'Brightness vs time' light-curve panel shows a dip during transit.

SVG: ramp on a clamp stand sloping steeply down to a flat bench. An orange toy car (mass 0.20 kg) sits part-way down the ramp aligned with the slope; label 'Toy car — 0.20 kg'. Ramp height marked 80 cm ('Ramp height / cm'), ramp length marked 80 cm ('Ramp length / cm'). A teal double-arrow below the flat surface shows 'distance travelled on flat surface'.

render_data.title: Ramp investigation — toy car (0.20 kg) released from the ramp

topic: Dynamic trolley with cone drag device
image_prompt: SVG: 'Dynamic trolley experiment — cone drag device' — wooden toy trolley with red wheels and a backward-facing dark blue CONE drag device of base-radius R mounted on a mast. Yellow arrow indicates R from the cone axis to the base rim. Ruler scale below labelled 0.0 to 25 m; 'Click to push down release mechanism' callout at the launcher.

render_data.title: Dynamic trolley with cone drag — launch along the 0–25 m ruler
